-- 3 of 16 --

TELLING
STORIES
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 16 --

Simple Story-Telling Tips
• 	Start in the middle of the action
• 	Avoid Bald Stories
• 	Show, don’t tell
• 	John was mad
• 	John kicked the door open and slammed his briefcase on
the table.
• 	Incorporate dialogue (with action beats)
• 	“Go home,” John said, as he glanced at his watch. “You’re
going to be late for dinner.”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 16 --

TACTICS &
GAMBITS
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 16 --

A Known Tactic Is
A BLOWN TACTIC!
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 16 --

The Takeaway
• This is not for you if…
• This may not be right for you…
• You should pass on this offer, unless you…
• …if you qualify
• …if you meet the following criteria…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 16 --

The Damaging Admission
• 	Admitting an insignificant negative about the
product/solution/mechanism
• 	“You won’t find any fancy graphics or images…”
• 	Savvy: Turning the Damaging Admission into a
positive
• 	“Let me be clear: This only does one thing. And that’s
because we wanted to focus on making it the best at
that.”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 16 --

“Let me be clear: This only does one thing.
And that’s because we wanted to focus on
making it the best at that. So, if you’re
looking for a mediocre ‘one app does it all’
kind of thing, this not for you. This is for
those folks who want the best.”
Combing both…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 16 --

Open Loops, Nested Loops
• More about that in a minute…
• In a moment I’ll tell you… First, let me…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 16 --

Frame Control
• How to alter your prospect’s perception of the
facts, even though the facts have not changed at
all.
• 90% of people who undergo this surgery are fine.
• 10% of the people who undergo this surgery die on
the table.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 16 --

Frame Control In Price
• One payment of $1000… or… 4 payments of $300.
• 4 payments of $300… or… you can save $200 with
one payment of only $1000.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 16 --

Framing Claims As Facts
●You already know that…
●You already recognize that…
●Obviously…
●Without a doubt…
●Without question…
●Certainly…
●Surely…
●There’s no question that…
●It’s clearly evident that…
●The fact is…
●Of course…
●We can agree that…
●Everyone in ____ knows…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 16 --

Framing (Steering) Choice
You have three choices for back pain:
• 	OTC Painkillers: All it takes is just popping a pill. But, OTC painkillers
can damage your intestinal tract, and never eliminate the real
cause of your pain.
• 	Massage Therapy: It’s extremely relaxing and enjoyable. But, the
wrong type of massage can seriously exacerbate a back injury and
even put you at risk for a secondary injury from loosened muscles
that are trying to protect your spine from the original injury.
• 	Chiropractic: Yes, it requires you take 15 minutes our of your
schedule each week. But, it’s the only proven way to help you
eliminate the real cause of your back pain, and it’s the only natural
and safe way to get and stay pain free.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 15 of 16 --

Framing (Steering) Choice
• Choice 1: Weak advantage, strong disadvantage,
strong disadvantage
• Choice 2: Strong advantage, strong disadvantage,
strong disadvantage
• Choice 3: Weak disadvantage, strong advantage,
strong advantage
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 16 of 16 --
